title: Evaluate Redis Caching for Repetitive Database Queries
description:
Evaluate and implement Redis caching to improve scalability. Many queries in the application are repetitive, serving the same data multiple times unless a Salesforce refresh is triggered. Redis can serve as an in-memory cache layer to reduce database round trips for these read-heavy, infrequently changing data sets.

This becomes increasingly important as the user base grows and concurrent requests increase.
acceptance_criteria: Redis is evaluated as a caching layer for repetitive queries
Candidate queries are identified for caching
Cache invalidation strategy is defined (e.g., on Salesforce refresh)
middleware_changes: Cache layer added for repetitive queries, with invalidation on Salesforce data refresh.
implementation_notes: Many queries serve the same data unless a Salesforce refresh is triggered. Redis can cache these results and invalidate on refresh. Laravel has built-in Redis cache driver support.
